FESTIVAL ATLAS

Store Capsule

A clean, local first music festival planner for building a route, saving session choices, and journaling what actually hit.

Short Description

Map a seeded festival circuit, lock the stops that matter, export the sessions worth keeping, and save the standout moments in one static tool.

About This Project

Festival Atlas is a lightweight planning board for people who want the trip logic and the memory log in the same place.

The current build stays focused on one loop:

1. browse the field
2. choose the stops
3. lock the sessions
4. journal the set
5. move to the next festival

Why It Works

- Static first
- Local first
- Fast to open
- Easy to host
- Easy to hand edit
- Strong visual hierarchy
- Useful route and journal flow without app bloat

Current Features

- Seeded festival explorer with search and filters
- Route board with trip notes and travel legs
- Session export to calendar
- Setkeeper journal for best set, standout memory, food note, travel note, and freeform notes
- Attended festival tracking
- Generated monogram marks instead of stored logo assets

One Line Pitch

A fast, static festival route board that makes the next run feel organized, personal, and ready to act on.
